report_metadata.step_description: Using the asset records from Step 7 and the symbol matches from Step 8, produce a fully enriched asset register via two-phase SFL linkage. Phase A — SFL lookup: for each asset whose own bare ID was not found in Step 8 (match_status 'not_found'), read the asset's 'superior_functional_location' field from the Step 7 TAL data (e.g. 'POLE01011307'), strip its prefix and leading zeros to a bare number (e.g. '1011307'), and check whether that bare number is present in Step 8's found_bare_map. If the superior asset WAS found on the drawing, inherit its symbol_description and legend label and set match_confidence to 'high'. Example: SLGT00316949 has superior_functional_location='POLE01011307'; bare SFL number is '1011307'; Step 8 found 1011307 with symbol 'Small hollow open circle' and label 'NEW POLE'; SLGT00316949 is therefore enriched with that label and confidence 'high'. Phase B — SFL chunk search: for assets whose SFL bare number was not in Step 8's found_bare_map (i.e. the superior asset was not itself in the TAL), search the site plan drawing chunks visually for the SFL bare number, and when found identify the adjacent symbol. Assets with no SFL field and those whose SFL was not found anywhere receive match_confidence 'none'.
report_metadata.validation_criteria: Must return a JSON object with 'enriched_assets' (array) and 'match_summary' (object). Every asset record from Step 7 must appear in 'enriched_assets'. Each entry must contain all original TAL fields plus: 'symbol_description' (string or null), 'legend_label' (string or null), 'legend_category' (string or null), 'match_confidence' (one of: high, none), and 'match_method' (one of: direct, sfl_lookup, sfl_chunk_search, sfl_not_found, no_sfl). 'match_summary' must include 'total', 'found_direct', 'found_via_sfl', 'found_on_drawing', and 'not_found' integer counts. Assets with match_method 'direct' or 'sfl_lookup' or 'sfl_chunk_search' must have match_confidence 'high'. A not_found count equal to total is acceptable when Step 8 found no matches and no SFL fields are populated — do not fail solely on this basis.

files_read.description: Output file produced by the agent

files_output.description: Validation test report generated by step validator

execution_context.prompt:
## STEP NAME
Enrich Assets with Legend Data

## STEP DESCRIPTION
Using the asset records from Step 7 and the symbol matches from Step 8, produce a fully enriched asset register via two-phase SFL linkage. Phase A — SFL lookup: for each asset whose own bare ID was not found in Step 8 (match_status 'not_found'), read the asset's 'superior_functional_location' field from the Step 7 TAL data (e.g. 'POLE01011307'), strip its prefix and leading zeros to a bare number (e.g. '1011307'), and check whether that bare number is present in Step 8's found_bare_map. If the superior asset WAS found on the drawing, inherit its symbol_description and legend label and set match_confidence to 'high'. Example: SLGT00316949 has superior_functional_location='POLE01011307'; bare SFL number is '1011307'; Step 8 found 1011307 with symbol 'Small hollow open circle' and label 'NEW POLE'; SLGT00316949 is therefore enriched with that label and confidence 'high'. Phase B — SFL chunk search: for assets whose SFL bare number was not in Step 8's found_bare_map (i.e. the superior asset was not itself in the TAL), search the site plan drawing chunks visually for the SFL bare number, and when found identify the adjacent symbol. Assets with no SFL field and those whose SFL was not found anywhere receive match_confidence 'none'.

## INPUT DATA (metadata/context sent to agent)
{}

## VALIDATION CRITERIA
Must return a JSON object with 'enriched_assets' (array) and 'match_summary' (object). Every asset record from Step 7 must appear in 'enriched_assets'. Each entry must contain all original TAL fields plus: 'symbol_description' (string or null), 'legend_label' (string or null), 'legend_category' (string or null), 'match_confidence' (one of: high, none), and 'match_method' (one of: direct, sfl_lookup, sfl_chunk_search, sfl_not_found, no_sfl). 'match_summary' must include 'total', 'found_direct', 'found_via_sfl', 'found_on_drawing', and 'not_found' integer counts. Assets with match_method 'direct' or 'sfl_lookup' or 'sfl_chunk_search' must have match_confidence 'high'. A not_found count equal to total is acceptable when Step 8 found no matches and no SFL fields are populated — do not fail solely on this basis.

## YOUR TASK
Generate and execute structured test cases against the agent's output. Use the FULL FILE CONTENTS (when provided) as your primary evidence. Cross-reference every item between input and output files. For each test case, document: the input data examined, the expected output, the actual output found, step-by-step execution notes of how you validated, and your final reasoning. Respond with the JSON test report.
